title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Housing.com International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Housing.com International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com International Enterprises family as a Frontend Developer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, MongoDB, Python, Go, CI/CD, Rust, AWS, Kubernetes
